description_long: This is a round, woven basket-style handbag with a deep bowl-shaped body and a single, sturdy arching handle. The exterior features a dark brown wood grain pattern, giving it a natural, rustic appearance. The basket's construction appears to be made from interlocking wooden strips, creating a subtle checkerboard effect on the surface. The handle is wide and seamlessly integrated into the rim of the basket, providing both strength and comfort for carrying. There are no visible closures, fasteners, or decorative embellishments, emphasizing a minimalist and functional design. The interior is spacious and open, suitable for carrying personal items or small goods.
description: A round, dark brown woven wooden basket handbag with a single wide handle and a natural, rustic finish. The design is minimalist, with no visible closures or decorations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open, bowl-shaped body and the arching handle, highlighting the woven wood pattern.
description_view_1: Side view with the handle directly facing the viewer, emphasizing the width and integration of the handle into the rim.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the open basket and handle from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Side view mirroring view 1, with the handle's width and attachment to the basket clearly visible.
attribute_strap_type: single fixed handle, short length, non-adjustable, attached at opposite sides of the rim
attribute_closure_mechanism: none; open top with no visible closure
